name: Word Search
author: Poki
description: Word Search is the classic game where you search for, you guessed it, words! Select your prefered language, and pick a nice theme. You can choose from Fruits, Computer, Countries, Vegetables, Music and Animals. Search for the words and try to set a record time!  Controls:  Click on the words to select them.  About the creator:  Word Search was created by Codethislab, they are known for many titles here on Poki, like UNO Online.
